type.fr: Commentaires généraux à propos de l'installation

comments.comment: ‘’Imperial acknowledges that part of the seepage event occurred in May, 2022, however, due to the complexity of the tailings ponds, geology and hydrogeology Imperial needed to undertake extensive field work including drilling, soil, surface water and groundwater quality monitoring and sampling throughout 2022 and 2023  and as it is nearly unfeasible to differentiate the seepage mass from 2022 and 2023, the entire seepage mass, as determined in 2024, is reported in the 2023 NPRI report’’
